Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.

  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros
    Class
    Description
    Feature
    A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.
    MutableState
    Realizes a variable bank for strategy features such that each feature computation can be done in parallel.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBetaFeature.TermInfo
    Informations about a term as cached within "betaCandidates"
    AppliedRuleAppsNameCache
    Establishes a cache for the applied rule apps to query them by name.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
    Class
    Description
    Feature
    A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.
    MutableState
    Realizes a variable bank for strategy features such that each feature computation can be done in parallel.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
    Class
    Description
    BinaryFeature
    Abstract superclass for features that have either zero cost or top cost.
    BinaryTacletAppFeature
    Abstract superclass for features of TacletApps that have either zero or top cost.
    Feature
    A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.
    MutableState
    Realizes a variable bank for strategy features such that each feature computation can be done in parallel.
    RuleSetDispatchFeature
    Feature for relating rule sets with feature terms.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBetaFeature
    This abstract class contains some auxiliary methods for the selection of beta rules that are supposed to be applied.
    AbstractMonomialSmallerThanFeature
     
    AbstractNonDuplicateAppFeature
     
    BinaryFeature
    Abstract superclass for features that have either zero cost or top cost.
    BinaryTacletAppFeature
    Abstract superclass for features of TacletApps that have either zero or top cost.
    DirectlyBelowFeature
    This feature returns zero if and only if the focus of the given rule application exists, is not top-level and the symbol immediately above the focus is badSymbol.
    Feature
    A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.
    InstantiatedSVFeature
    Feature that returns zero iff a certain schema variable is instantiated.
    MutableState
    Realizes a variable bank for strategy features such that each feature computation can be done in parallel.
    NonDuplicateAppFeature
    Binary feature that returns zero iff a certain Taclet app has not already been performed
    SmallerThanFeature
    Abstract superclass for features comparing terms (in particular polynomials or monomials) using the term ordering
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature used by de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.findprefix
